full_text:
Wang Shuang (Ziquan) 王雙 (子全)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Shuang (王雙), styledZiquan (子全). Served Cao Rui. Defeated Zhang Ni, and was later killed by Wei Yan. Wang Shuang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wang Shuang lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
